meta.title: Corporate Social Responsibility
meta.sourceDoc: 37. P2 - Corporate Social Responsibility  企业社会责任.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: Corporate Social Responsibility  企业社会责任

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：v
PDF 定位/解析：段落末提到企业为了得到"licencetooperate"-来自政府、社区等各方的隐性/显性许可-从而"justifyCSRinitiatives"，典型体 现了外部压力/驱动促使公司开展CSR。

题目 15
答案：viii
PDF 定位/解析：vili 整段围绕"successfulcorporationsneeda healthysociety...a healthysocietyneeds successfulcompanies"展开，论证了企业 与社会互惠互利的原因。

题目 16
答案：vi
PDF 定位/解析：vi 以石棉为例说明未预见长期社会影响的企业被追责、甚至破产一一过去的教训表明企业要为未来后果负责。

题目 17
答案：vii
PDF 定位/解析：vii "No business can solve all of society's problems... each company must select issues that intersect with its particular business" 一强调CSR应有选择性。

题目 18
答案：iii
PDF 定位/解析：GE资助学区中学，毕业率大幅提升，但文末说明"effectisinherentlylimited...incidentaltothecompany'sbusiness"，几乎 没有直接财务收益。

题目 19
答案：i
PDF 定位/解析：Microsoft解决IT人才短缺（限制其增长的"constraint"），通过合作院校培养人才，帮助企业继续扩张。

题目 20
答案：ii
PDF 定位/解析：WholeFoods将社会使命融入"valueproposition"，从采购、能源、运输到清洁用品，几乎所有业务环节都体现cSR。

questionSections.text:
题目 21
答案：equal opportunity
PDF 定位/解析："Education, health care,and equalopportunity are essential toa productive workforce."

题目 22
答案：internal costs
PDF 定位/解析：...working conditions not only attractcustomers butlowerthe internal costs of accidents."

questionSections.text:
题目 23
答案：C
PDF 解析：C (Whole Foods) ""Spoiledproduce andbiodegradablewastearetruckedto regional centresforcomposting.

题目 24
答案：C
PDF 解析：C (Whole Foods) "The company's sourcing emphasises purchases from local farmers... Buyers screen out foods containing..."

题目 25
答案：A
PDF 解析：GE资助表现欠佳的公立高中；改善毕业率，扶持教育薄弱地区。 A (General Electric)

题目 26
答案：B
PDF 解析：B (Microsoft) 其计划为社区学院提供课程更新与教师培训，解决"/Tcurricula are not standardised/outdated"。
